channel.title: Chroniq Now: Breaking Global News and Headlines Daily
channel.description: Chroniq Now - your trusted source for breaking global news, in-depth analysis and up-to-the-minute coverage of politics, business, culture and more.

item.title: NASA Data Confirms 27 New 'Tatooine' Planets on Star Wars Day
item.description:
Astronomers have identified 27 potential new planets orbiting two suns using NASA's TESS telescope, proving 'double sunsets' like the fictional Tatooine are more common than we thought.

Key points:
• Researchers used a novel detection method called apsidal precession, which tracks gravitational wobbles in eclipsing binary star orbits — bypassing the limitations of traditional transit-based searches.
• Of 1,590 binary star systems analyzed, 36 showed unexplained precession signals; 27 of those have mass and orbital characteristics consistent with planets.
• Binary stars make up over half of all star systems, suggesting Tatooine-like worlds could be far more common than the roughly 14 previously confirmed circumbinary planets implied.
• The announcement was timed to Star Wars Day (May 4th), though follow-up observations — such as radial velocity measurements — are still needed to fully confirm the finds.

Read the full article: NASA Data Confirms 27 New 'Tatooine' Planets on Star Wars Day

item.title: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
item.description:
Driven Advisors and Administrative Services face scrutiny in a legal dispute with Bancrédito Holding Corp, owner of Bancrédito International Bank and Trust.

Read the full article: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
